contents.value:
```css
display: flex;
```
Sets the element to use flexbox layout model.

```css
display: grid;
```
Sets the element to use CSS Grid layout model.

```css
display: block;
```
Sets the element to block-level display.

```css
display: none;
```
Hides the element completely from the layout.

```css
padding: 1rem; /* 16px */
```
Sets padding on all four sides to 1rem.

```css
padding: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
```
Sets padding on all four sides to 0.5rem.

```css
margin: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
```
Sets margin on all four sides to 0.5rem.

```css
margin: 1rem; /* 16px */
```
Sets margin on all four sides to 1rem.

```css
margin: -1rem; /* -16px */
```
Sets negative margin on all four sides.

```css
padding-left: 1rem; /* 16px */
padding-right: 1rem; /* 16px */
```
Sets horizontal padding to 1rem.

```css
padding-top: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
padding-bottom: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
```
Sets vertical padding to 0.5rem.

```css
gap: 1rem; /* 16px */
```
Sets the gap between flex/grid items.

```css
font-size: 1.125rem; /* 18px */
line-height: 1.75rem; /* 28px */
```
Sets font size to large.

```css
font-size: 1.25rem; /* 20px */
line-height: 1.75rem; /* 28px */
```
Sets font size to extra large.

```css
font-size: 0.875rem; /* 14px */
line-height: 1.25rem; /* 20px */
```
Sets font size to small.

```css
background-color: #3b82f6;
```
![color](https://via.placeholder.com/12/3b82f6/3b82f6.png) Blue 500 from the default color palette.

```css
background-color: #f3f4f6;
```
![color](https://via.placeholder.com/12/f3f4f6/f3f4f6.png) Gray 100 — a very light gray.

```css
color: #ffffff;
```
Sets text color to white.

```css
color: #374151;
```
![color](https://via.placeholder.com/12/374151/374151.png) Gray 700 — medium-dark gray for body text.

```css
border-radius: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
```
Sets border radius to large (0.5rem).

```css
border-radius: 0.75rem; /* 12px */
```
Sets border radius to extra large (0.75rem).

```css
border-radius: 9999px;
```
Sets fully rounded corners, creating a circle for square elements.

```css
box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
```
Applies a medium drop shadow.

```css
box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
```
Applies a large drop shadow.

```css
width: 100%;
```
Sets width to 100% of the parent.

```css
height: 100vh;
```
Sets height to 100% of the viewport height.

```css
align-items: center;
```
Vertically centers flex/grid children along the cross axis.

```css
justify-content: center;
```
Horizontally centers flex/grid children along the main axis.

```css
position: relative;
```
Positions the element relative to its normal position.

```css
position: absolute;
```
Positions the element relative to its nearest positioned ancestor.

```css
position: fixed;
```
Positions the element relative to the viewport.

```css
position: sticky;
```
Positions the element based on scroll position — sticks when reaching the offset.

```css
position: static;
```
Default positioning — element follows normal document flow.

```css
overflow: hidden;
```
Clips content that overflows the element's box.

```css
overflow: auto;
```
Adds scrollbars only when content overflows.

```css
overflow: visible;
```
Content can overflow the element's box (default).

```css
overflow-x: auto;
```
Adds horizontal scrollbar when content overflows.

```css
overflow-y: auto;
```
Adds vertical scrollbar when content overflows.

```css
flex-direction: row;
```
Flex items laid out horizontally (default).

```css
flex-direction: column;
```
Flex items laid out vertically.

```css
flex-direction: row-reverse;
```
Flex items laid out horizontally in reverse.

```css
flex-direction: column-reverse;
```
Flex items laid out vertically in reverse.

```css
flex-wrap: wrap;
```
Allows flex items to wrap to new lines.

```css
flex-wrap: nowrap;
```
Prevents flex items from wrapping (default).

```css
flex: 1 1 0%;
```
Item grows and shrinks as needed, ignoring initial size.

```css
flex: 1 1 auto;
```
Item grows and shrinks, considering its initial size.

```css
flex: 0 1 auto;
```
Item can shrink but won't grow beyond its initial size.

```css
flex: none;
```
Prevents the item from growing or shrinking.

```css
flex-grow: 1;
```
Allows the flex item to grow to fill available space.

```css
flex-grow: 0;
```
Prevents the flex item from growing.

```css
flex-shrink: 1;
```
Allows the flex item to shrink.

```css
flex-shrink: 0;
```
Prevents the flex item from shrinking.

```css
justify-content: space-between;
```
Distributes items with equal space between them.

```css
justify-content: space-around;
```
Distributes items with equal space around them.

```css
justify-content: space-evenly;
```
Distributes items with equal space between and around them.

```css
justify-content: flex-start;
```
Packs items to the start of the main axis.

```css
justify-content: flex-end;
```
Packs items to the end of the main axis.

```css
align-items: flex-start;
```
Aligns items to the start of the cross axis.

```css
align-items: flex-end;
```
Aligns items to the end of the cross axis.

```css
align-items: baseline;
```
Aligns items along their baselines.

```css
align-items: stretch;
```
Stretches items to fill the cross axis (default).

```css
align-self: center;
```
Centers an individual flex/grid item on the cross axis.

```css
align-self: flex-start;
```
Aligns the item to the start of the cross axis.

```css
align-self: flex-end;
```
Aligns the item to the end of the cross axis.

```css
grid-template-columns: repeat(1, minmax(0, 1fr));
```
Single column grid.

```css
grid-template-columns: repeat(12, minmax(0, 1fr));
```
12-column grid (standard layout grid).

```css
grid-column: span 1 / span 1;
```
Spans 1 grid column.

```css
grid-column: span 2 / span 2;
```
Spans 2 grid columns.

```css
grid-column: span 3 / span 3;
```
Spans 3 grid columns.

```css
grid-row: span 2 / span 2;
```
Spans 2 grid rows.

```css
grid-auto-flow: row;
```
Items placed by filling each row (default).

```css
grid-auto-flow: column;
```
Items placed by filling each column.

```css
grid-auto-flow: dense;
```
Items placed to fill holes in the grid.

```css
gap: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
```
Sets the gap between flex/grid items.

```css
gap: 1.5rem; /* 24px */
```
Sets the gap between flex/grid items.

```css
text-transform: uppercase;
```
Transforms text to uppercase.

```css
text-transform: lowercase;
```
Transforms text to lowercase.

```css
text-transform: capitalize;
```
Capitalizes the first letter of each word.

```css
white-space: nowrap;
```
Prevents text from wrapping.

```css
white-space: pre;
```
Preserves whitespace and line breaks.

```css
overflow-wrap: break-word;
```
Breaks words to prevent overflow.

```css
word-break: break-all;
```
Breaks words at any character to prevent overflow.

```css
font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif,
  "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji";
```

```css
font-family: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria,
  "Times New Roman", Times, serif;
```

```css
font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo,
  Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace;
```

```css
filter: grayscale(100%);
```
Converts the element to grayscale.

```css
filter: invert(100%);
```
Inverts the element's colors.

```css
filter: sepia(100%);
```
Applies a sepia tone.

```css
filter: brightness(.5);
```
Darkens the element to 50% brightness.

```css
backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
```
Applies a small blur to the backdrop.

```css
backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
```
Applies a medium blur to the backdrop.

```css
box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--tw-ring-color);
```
Creates a 2px ring around the element.

```css
box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px var(--tw-ring-color);
```
Creates a 4px ring around the element.

```css
--tw-ring-inset: inset;
```
Moves the ring to inside the element.

```css
transform: translateX(-50%);
```
Commonly used with `left-1/2` for horizontal centering.

```css
transform: translateY(-50%);
```
Commonly used with `top-1/2` for vertical centering.

```css
display: flow-root;
```
Creates a new block formatting context.

```css
display: contents;
```
Element's children act as direct children of the parent.

```css
background-color: #1f2937;
```
![color](https://via.placeholder.com/12/1f2937/1f2937.png) Gray 800 — used for dark backgrounds.

```css
color: #9ca3af;
```
![color](https://via.placeholder.com/12/9ca3af/9ca3af.png) Gray 400 — used for muted/placeholder text.

```css
box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
```
Extra large shadow.

```css
box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.25);
```
2XL shadow — largest built-in shadow.

```css
min-height: 100vh;
```
Sets minimum height to full viewport.

```css
cursor: pointer;
```
Sets pointer cursor for interactive elements.

```css
cursor: not-allowed;
```
Sets not-allowed cursor for disabled elements.

```css
user-select: all;
```
Selects all text on click.

```css
pointer-events: none;
```
Disables all pointer events.

```css
isolation: isolate;
```
Creates a new stacking context.

```css
object-fit: cover;
```
Resizes content to cover the element, cropping if needed.

```css
object-fit: contain;
```
Resizes content to fit within the element.

```css
aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
```
16:9 aspect ratio for video content.

```css
will-change: transform;
```
Optimizes transform animations for the GPU.

```css
appearance: none;
```
Removes native form styling.

```css
scroll-behavior: smooth;
```
Enables smooth scrolling for anchor links.

```css
scroll-snap-type: x var(--tw-scroll-snap-strictness);
```
Enables horizontal scroll snapping.

```css
scroll-snap-type: y var(--tw-scroll-snap-strictness);
```
Enables vertical scroll snapping.

```css
touch-action: none;
```
Disables all touch actions.

```css
touch-action: manipulation;
```
Allows panning and pinch zoom but disables double-tap zoom.

```tailwindcss
sm:{utility}
```
Responsive prefix applying styles at min-width: 640px. Mobile-first breakpoint.

```tailwindcss
md:{utility}
```
Responsive prefix applying styles at min-width: 768px.

```tailwindcss
lg:{utility}
```
Responsive prefix applying styles at min-width: 1024px.

```tailwindcss
xl:{utility}
```
Responsive prefix applying styles at min-width: 1280px.

```tailwindcss
2xl:{utility}
```
Responsive prefix applying styles at min-width: 1536px.

```tailwindcss
{property}-[{value}]
```
Use arbitrary values with square bracket notation for one-off styles. E.g. `w-[200px]`, `bg-[#1da1f2]`, `grid-cols-[1fr_2fr]`.

```tailwindcss
!{utility}
```
Prefix any utility with `!` to generate the style with `!important`. E.g. `!p-4` → `padding: 1rem !important`.

```tailwindcss
dark:{utility}
```
Applies styles when dark mode is active. Controlled by `darkMode` option in config: 'media' (prefers-color-scheme) or 'class' (.dark parent).

```tailwindcss
group / group-hover: / group-focus:
```
Mark a parent with `group` class and style children with `group-{state}:` variants. Children respond to parent hover/focus/active states.

```tailwindcss
peer / peer-hover: / peer-focus: / peer-checked:
```
Mark a sibling with `peer` class and use `peer-{state}:` on subsequent siblings. Enables sibling-based conditional styling.

```tailwindcss
mode: 'jit'
```
Just-In-Time compilation mode generates styles on demand. Default in Tailwind CSS v3+. Enables arbitrary values, all variants, and faster build times.

```tailwindcss
{property}-{value}
```
Tailwind utility classes follow a `{property}-{value}` pattern. The property maps to a CSS property and the value maps to a design token from the theme configuration.

```tailwindcss
-{utility}-{value}
```
Prefix utilities with `-` for negative values. E.g. `-m-4` → `margin: -1rem`, `-translate-x-full` → `transform: translateX(-100%)`.

```tailwindcss
tailwind.config.js
```
Configuration file for customizing Tailwind: theme (colors, spacing, fonts), plugins, content paths, dark mode, prefix, important, and variant order.

```tailwindcss
content: ['{paths}']
```
Specifies file paths for Tailwind to scan for class names. Required for tree-shaking unused styles. Supports glob patterns.
